findings.criterion: `tests/interfaces/lifecycle/test_caused_by_autoderive.py` passes: closing a bug (`--class regression`) over a single-culprit fixture yields a `caused_by` link to the resolved ticket — proving the direct-writer path defeats the closed-source guard.
findings.detail: The file `test_caused_by_autoderive.py` exists but contains only `test_explicit_caused_by_on_bug_close`, which tests the explicit `--caused-by` flag path. Its own docstring says "Blame auto-derivation, the library facade, and ambiguity are held out." The single-culprit blame auto-derivation test (`test_blame_autoderives_single_culprit`) is only in `test_caused_by_autoderive_heldout.py` (which is labeled WITHHELD). The criterion requires that `test_caused_by_autoderive.py` demonstrate a single-culprit blame fixture yielding a `caused_by` link — this test is absent from that file.

findings.criterion: An ambiguous two-commit blame yields no auto `caused_by` link — integration test asserts absence.
findings.detail: The ambiguous blame test (`test_ambiguous_blame_draws_no_autolink`) exists only in `test_caused_by_autoderive_heldout.py` (labeled WITHHELD/held-out) and is absent from `test_caused_by_autoderive.py`. The acceptance criterion requires an integration test asserting absence of the auto-link on an ambiguous two-commit blame. No such test exists in a non-heldout test file.

data.remediation: How to resolve the unmet criteria: for each one, decide whether the work is genuinely incomplete or simply undocumented. If a requirement is already satisfied but the proof is not discoverable from the code alone, add a comment to this ticket that documents the evidence — cite the concrete artifacts that meet the requirement (file paths and line ranges, commands and their output, links, or the reasoning that ties the work to the criterion). The completion verifier reads this ticket's comments, so evidence you record there is taken into account on the next verification. For any criterion whose work is genuinely unfinished, complete it, then re-verify.
